name: Natural Park of the Desert de Le Palmes – Circular from Benicàssim
name_original: Parque Natural del Desert de Le Palmes – Circular desde Benicàssim
region_intro: Touring cycling routes around Benicàssim / Benicasim offer a diverse landscape, situated between the Mediterranean Sea and mountainous terrain. The region features a long coastline with flat, scenic paths and the challenging climbs of the Desierto de las Palmas Natural Park. This combination provides varied cycling experiences, from coastal routes to mountain trails with panoramic views. The area benefits from a mild climate, making it suitable for cycling throughout much of the year. Best touring cycling routes around Benicàssim / Benicasim The most popular touring cycling route is From Benicàssim to Oropesa via the Vía Verde del Mar, a 14.7 miles (23.7 km) trail that takes 1 hour 26 minutes to complete. This easy route follows the scenic coastal Vía Verde, connecting Benicàssim with Oropesa del Mar. Another top favourite among local touring cyclists is Natural Park of the Desert de Le Palmes – Circular from Benicàssim, a difficult 14.8 miles (23.8 km) path. This route ascends through the mountainous terrain of the Desierto de las Palmas Natural Park, offering significant elevation gain and panoramic views. Local touring cyclists also love the Via Verde Oropesa Benicassim – Tunnel de Capicorb loop from Benicàssim, a 21.8 miles (35.0 km) trail leading through coastal paths and a tunnel, often completed in about 2 hours 10 minutes. Touring cycling around Benicàssim / Benicasim is defined by coastal paths, the Vía Verde del Mar, and the mountainous terrain of the Desierto de las Palmas Natural Park. The network offers options for various ability levels, from easy coastal rides to challenging mountain ascents. The routes in Benicàssim / Benicasim are highly rated by the komoot community with an average score of 4.6 stars from over 700 reviews. More than 5000 touring cyclists have used komoot to explore Benicàssim / Benicasim's varied terrain.
region_faq:
Q: How many touring cycling routes are available in Benicàssim / Benicasim?
A: There are over 60 touring cycling routes around Benicàssim / Benicasim, offering a wide range of experiences for all skill levels. The komoot community has explored these routes over 5000 times, contributing to an average rating of 4.6 stars.

Q: What kind of terrain can I expect when cycling around Benicàssim / Benicasim?
A: Benicàssim / Benicasim offers a diverse landscape for touring cyclists. You'll find flat, scenic coastal paths along the Mediterranean Sea, including the popular Vía Verde del Mar. Inland, the routes ascend into the mountainous terrain of the Desierto de las Palmas Natural Park, providing challenging climbs and panoramic views.

Q: What is the best time of year to go touring cycling in Benicàssim / Benicasim?
A: Benicàssim / Benicasim enjoys a mild climate, making it suitable for touring cycling much of the year. Spring, autumn, and winter are particularly pleasant, offering comfortable temperatures for exploring both coastal and mountainous routes.

Q: Are there easy touring cycling routes suitable for beginners or families in Benicàssim / Benicasim?
A: Yes, there are many easy routes perfect for beginners and families. The region boasts over 25 easy touring cycling routes. A great option is &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/e934150793/from-benicassim-to-oropesa-via-the-via-verde-del-mar" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;From Benicàssim to Oropesa via the Vía Verde del Mar&lt;/a&gt;, which follows a flat, traffic-free path along the coast. Another family-friendly choice is the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/10381104" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Benicàssim Seafront Cycle Path – Playa del Gurugú loop from Benicàssim&lt;/a&gt;.

Q: Are there challenging touring cycling routes for experienced cyclists?
A: Absolutely. For experienced cyclists seeking a challenge, Benicàssim / Benicasim offers over 30 difficult routes. The mountainous terrain of the Desierto de las Palmas Natural Park provides significant elevation gains and rewarding views. A notable difficult route is the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/e936828036/natural-park-of-the-desert-de-le-palmes-circular-from-benicassim" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Natural Park of the Desert de Le Palmes – Circular from Benicàssim&lt;/a&gt;.

Q: Can I find circular touring cycling routes in the area?
A: Yes, several excellent circular touring cycling routes are available. For a challenging loop through the mountains, consider the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/e936828036/natural-park-of-the-desert-de-le-palmes-circular-from-benicassim" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Natural Park of the Desert de Le Palmes – Circular from Benicàssim&lt;/a&gt;. Coastal options include the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/19512760" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Via Verde Oropesa Benicassim – Tunnel de Capicorb loop from Benicàssim&lt;/a&gt; and the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/10381104" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Benicàssim Seafront Cycle Path – Playa del Gurugú loop from Benicàssim&lt;/a&gt;.

Q: What natural features or landmarks can I see along the touring cycling routes?
A: The routes offer a mix of natural beauty and historical landmarks. Along the coast, you can spot historical watchtowers like the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/5380691" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Tower of the Rope&lt;/a&gt; and the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/6093829" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Torre del Rey of Oropesa&lt;/a&gt;. Inland, the Desierto de las Palmas Natural Park features lush vegetation, including palm hearts, and offers stunning viewpoints such as &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/6410383" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;El Colomer Observatory&lt;/a&gt;, providing panoramic views of the Mediterranean and surrounding natural areas.

Q: Are there specific viewpoints worth visiting on a touring cycling trip?
A: Yes, Benicàssim / Benicasim is rich in scenic viewpoints. Within the Desierto de las Palmas Natural Park, you'll find spectacular vistas from locations like Els Canons, Portería Alta, and the peaks of Mola del Morico and El Bartolo. The &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/6410383" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;El Colomer Observatory&lt;/a&gt; is another excellent spot for panoramic views.

Q: Are there any routes that connect Benicàssim with other towns?
A: Yes, the Vía Verde del Mar is a prime example, connecting Benicàssim with Oropesa del Mar. This 5.7 km to 6 km route, built on an old railway line, offers stunning coastal views and is suitable for all skill levels. You can experience it on routes like &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/e934150793/from-benicassim-to-oropesa-via-the-via-verde-del-mar" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;From Benicàssim to Oropesa via the Vía Verde del Mar&lt;/a&gt;.

Q: What do other touring cyclists enjoy the most about touring cycling in Benicàssim / Benicasim?
A: The area is highly rated by the komoot community, with an average score of 4.6 stars from over 700 reviews. Reviewers often praise the region's diverse terrain, which offers both relaxing coastal rides and challenging mountain ascents, as well as the stunning Mediterranean views and the well-maintained Vía Verde del Mar.

Q: Are there any long-distance touring cycling routes available?
A: While many routes are designed for day trips, some can be combined or extended for longer distances. For example, the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/40355202" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Playa del Gurugú – El Pirulí Promenade loop from Apartamentos Alborán&lt;/a&gt; offers a substantial coastal ride, and routes through the Desierto de las Palmas can be linked for extended mountain exploration.
tips: A magnificent Natural Park a few kilometers from Benicàssim. You can take a tour in the modality you like, a Park that offers gravel tracks, asphalt roads and secondary roads so you can go through it to your liking. Either way you visit it you will have incredible panoramic views.

waypoints.name: View of the Desert de les Palmes Natural Park
